kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: Capture Screenshot On Failure will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to be executed when an AppiumLibrary keyword fails.

test.name: TC_M1.2_002 - Verify That The User Can Initiate The Signup Process

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Application
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.msg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
Closes the current application and the webdriver session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run
kw.msg: Running command 'adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.higala.ruralbanksanantonioitg 2>&1'.
kw.doc: _This keyword is considered deprecated. Use the [http://robotframework.org/robotframework/latest/libraries/Process.html| Process] library instead._

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Activate Application
kw.doc: Activates the application if it is not running or is running in the background.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

test.doc:
Verify user can tap Get Started, enter a valid unregistered email, tap Next, and be redirected to the OTP Verification screen. A system OTP is sent to the registered email.
Pre-conditions: Mobile app is launched. AC_SIGNUP_EMAIL_1 is not registered.

test.name: TC_M1.2_003 - Verify That The User Can Complete OTP Verification

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

test.doc:
Verify user can enter the magic OTP and be allowed to proceed to the next step: Policy Agreement screen.
Pre-conditions: App launched. AC_SIGNUP_EMAIL_2 is not registered. NOTE: Magic OTP = 123456 (test environment only).

test.name: TC_M1.2_004 - Verify That The User Can Review And Agree To Bank Policies

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

test.doc:
Verify user can view Terms & Conditions and Data Privacy Policy, tick both checkboxes, and tap Next to proceed to the Personal Details screen.
Pre-conditions: App launched. AC_POLICY_EMAIL is not registered. NOTE: T&C and Privacy modal close button locator — verify with Appium Inspector if this fails.

test.name: TC_M1.2_005 - Verify That User Can Fill Up Personal Details Page

kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Swipe By Percent
kw.doc: Swipes from one percent of the screen to another percent, for an optional ``duration``. Normal swipe fails to scale for different screen resolutions, this can be avoided by using this keyword.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='Verify your identity'] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='Verify your identity'] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='Verify your identity'] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='Verify your identity']
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

test.doc:
Verify user can enter First Name, Middle Name (optional), Last Name, Suffix (optional), Gender, Date of Birth, and mobile number, then proceed to Verify Identity screen.
Pre-conditions: App launched. AC_PERSONAL_EMAIL is not registered. NOTE: DOB uses a NumberPicker dialog — verify picker column order (Month/Day/Year) with Appium Inspector. NOTE: If hint-based locators fail for name fields, switch to positional (//android.widget.EditText)[N].

test.name: TC_M1.2_006 - Verify That The User Can Verify Identity Via Veriff

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='Verify your ID'] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='Verify your ID']

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

test.doc:
Verify user can select ID type, enter ID number and expiry date, tap Proceed to Veriff, and complete the KYC process (photo of ID + selfie).
Pre-conditions: User is on the Verify Your Identity screen (reached via TC_M1.2_005 flow). NOTE: Veriff runs inside a Chrome WebView at alchemy.veriff.com. Chrome WebRTC camera API does NOT work with Android emulator virtual camera. This test REQUIRES a physical Android device for camera capture. NOTE: On sandbox/test env, tapping the capture button twice typically accepts the image without valid scanning — verify with QA before automating.

test.name: TC_M1.2_007 - Verify That The User Can Successfully Input Profile Information

test.doc:
Verify user can select Nationality, Region/Province/City of Birth, select Civil Status, then proceed to Mother's Maiden Name page.
Pre-conditions: AC_HAPPY_PV_EMAIL has Veriff bypass — OTP resumes at Profile screen. Independent test (no longer chained from 006). Uses Navigate To Profile Screen keyword.

test.name: TC_M1.2_008 - Verify That The User Can Successfully Input Mother's Maiden Name

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[contains(@text,'Present Address') or contains(@text,'Address')] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[contains(@text,'Present Address') or contains(@text,'Address')] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[contains(@text,'Present Address') or contains(@text,'Address')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

test.doc:
Verify user can enter Mother's First Name, Middle Name, and Last Name, tick "I certify I am not a US Citizen", tap Next, and land on the Present Address page.
Pre-conditions: jjavier+156@nmblr.ai has Veriff pre-completed on physical device. Full onboarding flow: OTP → Policy → Personal Details → VI → Veriff (ID Verified) → Profile → Mother's Maiden Name (fill) → verify Present Address screen visible. NOTE: All MMN EditTexts have hint="" — confirmed via emulator dump. Positional selectors used.

test.name: TC_M1.2_009 - Verify That The User Can Successfully Input Address

kw.name: Swipe By Percent
kw.doc: Swipes from one percent of the screen to another percent, for an optional ``duration``. Normal swipe fails to scale for different screen resolutions, this can be avoided by using this keyword.

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

test.doc:
Verify user can select Region, Province, City, and Barangay, enter street details and zip code, and proceed to Financial Information page.
Pre-conditions: jjavier+156@nmblr.ai has Veriff pre-completed on physical device. Full onboarding flow is resumed: OTP → Policy → Personal Details → VI → Veriff (ID Verified) → Profile → Mother's Maiden Name → Present Address → verify Financial Info screen visible. NOTE: AC_BARANGAY_OPTION='Bagong Nayon', AC_ADDR_STREET/ZIP hints confirmed via emulator dump.

test.name: TC_M1.2_010 - Verify That The User Can Successfully Input Financial Information And Complete Account Creation

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

test.doc:
Verify user can enter Occupation, Company Industry, Monthly Income range, tap Submit, and land on the account creation success screen.
Pre-conditions: jjavier+156@nmblr.ai has Veriff pre-completed on physical device. Full onboarding flow: OTP → Policy → Personal Details → VI → Veriff (ID Verified) → Profile → Mother's Maiden Name → Address → Financial Info → Submit → Success screen. WARNING: This test COMPLETES account creation for jjavier+156@nmblr.ai. After a successful run, update the email to a fresh Veriff-completed account. NOTE: All dropdown values confirmed via emulator run (Bagong Nayon, Information and Communication, Less than ₱20,000).

test.name: TC_M1.2_020 - Verify User Can Request A New OTP After 1-Minute Cooldown Expires

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Application
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.msg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
Closes the current application and the webdriver session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run
kw.msg: Running command 'adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.higala.ruralbanksanantonioitg 2>&1'.
kw.doc: _This keyword is considered deprecated. Use the [http://robotframework.org/robotframework/latest/libraries/Process.html| Process] library instead._

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Activate Application
kw.doc: Activates the application if it is not running or is running in the background.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.TextView[@text='OTP Verification']' did not match any elements after 15 seconds
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.TextView[@text='OTP Verification']' did not match any elements after 15 seconds

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.status: Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.TextView[@text='OTP Verification']' did not match any elements after 15 seconds

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

test.doc:
Verify that after the 1-minute cooldown expires, the user can tap Resend code, receive a new OTP, and successfully complete OTP verification to reach the Policy page.
Pre-conditions: User is on OTP Verification screen; 1-minute cooldown has completed.
test.status: Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.TextView[@text='OTP Verification']' did not match any elements after 15 seconds

test.name: TC_M1.2_033 - Verify No Email Block When Valid OTP Is Entered On 5th Attempt Of 3rd Session
test.doc:
After 2 abandoned sessions, the 3rd session with 4 wrong OTPs + 1 correct (magic OTP 123456) should verify the session — NOT trigger an email block. The user must land on the Policy Agreement screen.
Pre-conditions: AC_SIGNUP_EMAIL_7 is unregistered and not blocked.
test.status: Failure occurred and exit-on-failure mode is in use.

test.name: TC_M1.2_032 - Verify User Can Sign Up With Valid OTP After 60-Minute Block Period Expires
test.doc:
After AC_POST_BLOCK_EMAIL has been blocked and 60 minutes have elapsed, the user must be able to initiate a new sign-up session and receive an OTP normally.
Pre-conditions: AC_POST_BLOCK_EMAIL was blocked via 3 failed OTP sessions. 60 minutes must have elapsed before running this test. Pair with m1.2.27/29/30 to trigger the block first.
test.status: Failure occurred and exit-on-failure mode is in use.

errors.msg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
